title: gladiolus aphyllus
intro: Gladiolus aphyllus, also known as the "bladeless gladiolus" or "stemless gladiolus," is a rare and unusual species of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family, Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus aphyllus are thought to include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate pain. Gladiolus aphyllus is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although there is limited modern research to support its effectiveness and more studies are needed to confirm its benefits.
